title: lasthenia platycarpha
intro: Lasthenia platycarpha, also known as Island Yarrow or Island Coyote Tobacco, is a perennial plant species native to the Channel Islands of California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lasthenia platycarpha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
